message.content: How do I use FTS5 full-text search in SQLite with Bun?
What about ranking results by relevance?

content.text:
FTS5 exposes a `bm25()` function for ranking:

```sql
SELECT *, bm25(docs) AS score
FROM docs
WHERE docs MATCH 'search term'
ORDER BY score;
```

BM25 scores are negative — more negative = better match. Combine with vector KNN via Reciprocal Rank Fusion for hybrid search.

message.content: How do I keep the FTS5 index in sync with the main table?

content.text:
Use triggers on INSERT/DELETE/UPDATE:

```sql
CREATE TRIGGER docs_ai AFTER INSERT ON docs BEGIN
  INSERT INTO docs_fts(rowid, title, body) VALUES (new.rowid, new.title, new.body);
END;
```

This keeps FTS5 automatically synced without manual re-indexing.
